classNames.root: pl-1 mr-6 bg-base-max text-primary opacity-100 hover:opacity-100 data-disabled:opacity-35 data-disabled:hover:text-primary data-disabled:hover:opacity-35

items.name: Discovery
items.tooltip: Use free-text search and tags to rapidly find relevant studies.

items.name: Dictionary
items.tooltip: The Data Dictionary serves to inform the data model and is updated as new data is ingested.

items.name: Exploration
items.tooltip: The Exploration Page enables discovery of the data at the subject level and features a cohort builder.

items.name: Analysis
items.tooltip: Learn how to use Jupyter Notebooks to explore and visualize data available by running a tutorial notebook, or use one of these examples as a launching point for your own custom analysis.

items.name: Workspace
items.tooltip: Gen3 workspaces are secure data analysis environments in the cloud that can access data from one or more data resources.

items.name: Profile
items.tooltip: Create API keys for programmatic data access, and review your authorization privileges to datasets and services.

classNames.root: flex justify-end items-center align-middle w-100 bg-primary text-primary-contrast

itemClassnames.button: flex flex-nowrap items-center align-middle border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary-light
itemClassnames.label: font-content text-primary-contrast block
